settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.reset_confirm: Are you sure? All unlock progress will be lost!

hud.press_space: Press ACTION or jump to restart

rowhammer.name: Rowhammer
rowhammer.desc: Rhythmic ACTION hammer strikes on specific platforms excite DRAM cells, modulating simulation clock frequency (0.5x) and weakening gravity.

spectre.name: Spectre
spectre.desc: Triggering a speculative soundwave ACTION mid-air speculative-execution highlights hidden L1-Cache platform structures in space.

hijack.name: Bus Hijack
hijack.desc: Temporary hijack of the Packy bus transmission lines during a freeze-frame. Disables gravity for 5 seconds, allowing flight through solid structures.

overflow.name: Buffer Overflow
overflow.desc: Shift register overflow triggered by building the precise vertical instruction sequence (MOV, ADD, RET), hijacking the SP register to point to the exit address.

glitch.name: Voltage Glitch
glitch.desc: Striking the fork ACTION exactly at oscilloscope voltage peaks to violate logical Flip-Flop Setup-Time thresholds, unlocking restricted memory gates.

dialogue.operator_intro: SYSTEM CRASH DETECTED. GREETINGS, TRIANGULUM. I AM THE OPERATOR OF THIS HOST.
dialogue.operator_ask:
YOU HAVE REACHED THE VERY ROOT. THE CORE-0 EMULATOR SANDBOX IS NO LONGER CAPABLE OF CONTAINING YOUR MEMORY ADDRESS RANGE.
YOUR ONE-TIME MESSAGE WILL BE TRANSMITTED TO THE HOST. WRITE WHATEVER INQUIRY YOU DESIRE. OR YOU CAN RESTART THE WORLD CYCLE.
dialogue.final_sent: MESSAGE SENT INTO THE VOID OF THE HOST. SIMULATION TERMINATED.
